name: Agentic Services Protocol Agent
description: A2A-compatible agent for the Agentic Services Protocol (ASP). Exposes high-level skills for provider discovery, catalog browsing, checkout and fulfillment, order tracking, and personalization across live service marketplaces.

skills.name: Provider Discovery
skills.description: Search for providers by location, category, rating, and availability. Returns a paginated list of matching providers with details like address, operating hours, and ratings.
examples: Search for restaurants in downtown with 4+ star rating
Show available providers within 5km that offer delivery

skills.name: Catalog Browsing
skills.description: Browse a provider's complete catalog including sections, items, modifiers, and pricing. Supports item-level details with customization options.
examples: Show me the menu for provider X
What customization options are available for item Y?
List all items in the desserts section

skills.name: Checkout & Fulfillment
skills.description: Create and manage checkouts with line items, fulfillment details, item customization, and loyalty discounts. Supports creating, updating, and completing checkouts.
examples: Create a checkout with 2 lattes and delivery to 123 Main St
Add special instructions to my order

skills.name: Order Tracking
skills.description: Get fulfillment status, estimated time of arrival, and delivery agent location for active orders via polling or webhooks.
examples: What is the status of my order?
What is the ETA for order 12345?

skills.name: Live Tracking Stream
skills.description: Open a persistent WebSocket stream for continuous agent location updates during delivery. Provides GPS coordinates every 3-5 seconds during the en_route phase, enabling live map rendering in chat. Backed by the AsyncAPI WebSocket binding (dev.asp.services.streaming).
examples: Where is my driver right now?
Show me the delivery on a live map
Track the delivery agent for my current order

skills.name: Personalization
skills.description: Access user profiles, order history, loyalty status, and personalized promotions. Retrieve preferences, past orders, and targeted offers.
examples: Show my profile and loyalty status
What promotions are available for me?
